# cartridges/oddjobz/brain/tests/vectors/capabilities/wrong_flag_counter_example.json

```json
{
  "description": "OP_CHECKDOMAINFLAG counter-example: quote cap presented against invoice cap's flag. Kernel returns domain_flag_mismatch (K3a per proofs/lean/Semantos/Theorems/DomainIsolationK3.lean).",
  "cap": "cap.oddjobz.quote",
  "cellHex": "",
  "presentedFlag": 65795,
  "presentedFlagHex": "0x00010103",
  "expectedDomainFlag": 65793,
  "expectedDomainFlagHex": "0x00010101",
  "expectedError": "domain_flag_mismatch"
}
```
